# VSETVLI SEW=8 LMUL=1
VINST=00000000000000000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

# VSLT mask = v0 < v1
VINST=01101100000100000000000101010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VADD v2 = v0 + v1
VINST=00000000000100000000000101010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=01011100001000000000000111010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0
